description: Register a MinIO S3-compatible object storage resource for use by other components

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Key used to register this resource. Other components reference it via resource_key.

access_key_env_var.label: Access Key Env Var
access_key_env_var.description: Environment variable holding the MinIO access key

secret_key_env_var.label: Secret Key Env Var
secret_key_env_var.description: Environment variable holding the MinIO secret key

default_bucket.label: Default Bucket
default_bucket.description: Default bucket name for object storage operations
